title: Insurer Directive Event
description: Emitted by the insurer-aurora-specialty Integration Service API Workflow when Aurora Specialty (ClearFlow's cyber insurer) issues a directive affecting the crisis response. A 'reservation_of_rights' directive triggers the tri-party HITL gate in Action Center at t+200s (simulated Day 45). The insurer's policy conditions are stored in Data Fabric Insurer.policy_directives.

source_system.description: The insurer Integration Service API Workflow.

insurer_id.description: The cyber insurer issuing the directive. Must match vocabulary.stakeholders.insurer id.

conditions.description: Conditions attached to the directive (from Data Fabric Insurer.policy_directives).

coverage_sub_limit_triggered.description: Whether the directive signals a coverage sub-limit has been hit.

required_actions.description: Actions ClearFlow must take to preserve coverage (e.g. 'retain Northwall Forensics', 'no public statement without counsel review').

maestro_trigger_filter_hint.description: Paste this as the Maestro Trigger FilterTree JSON when wiring this event in Slice 010/012. Creates the Action Center HITL task in the Fiduciary Review stage. The reservation_of_rights directive is the one that surfaces in the demo at t+200s.
maestro_trigger_filter_hint.action_center_title: TRI-PARTY APPROVAL — Resolve Fiduciary Conflict: Apex / Northstar / ClearFlow
